<!-- Generated from .aether/commands/reference-list.yaml - DO NOT EDIT DIRECTLY -->
---
name: ant-reference-list
description: "List installed global references"
---

Use the Go `aether` CLI as the source of truth.

- Execute `AETHER_OUTPUT_MODE=visual aether reference-list $ARGUMENTS` directly.
- Do not inspect raw reference directories unless the runtime output is insufficient for debugging.
- If docs and runtime disagree, runtime wins.
- Keep any wrapper summary to at most 2 short sentences.
